TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Monating ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 276 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 164 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 112 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 58%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Monating hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Monating hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Monating hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Monating hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Monating hya' ga Cirakesay. tay mkyahu' na Monating hya' ga Talampo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Monating ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ monatiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa talampo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ monatiŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Monating ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 276 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 164 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 112 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 58%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Monating hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Monating hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Monating hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Monating hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Monating hya' ga Cirakesay. tay mkyahu' na Monating hya' ga Talampo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Monating ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ monatiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na monatiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa talampo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ monatiŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
